nodes.label: AI for efficiency in routine tasks
nodes.label_negative: AI for nuanced human judgment tasks
nodes.grounding_span: we mostly use it to enhance efficiency with emailing and note taking

nodes.label: AI-generated content requiring human proofreading
nodes.grounding_span: Adjustments will usually be made, there have been some instances of people failing to proof read

nodes.label: AI as collaborative tool
nodes.grounding_span: Only collaboration, at my level of the company there isn't much room for independent designation of tasks to AI Systems yet

nodes.label: Human judgment in triaging complex maintenance issues
nodes.grounding_span: many jobs can initially appear to be simple and low priority, but they may be more urgent and involve an intricate understanding of issue

nodes.label: Emotional support and reassurance in customer service
nodes.grounding_span: Part of my role is to council them through the issue and reassure them

nodes.label: Workplace efficiency and time savings
nodes.grounding_span: Saving time generating templates for bulk email dissemination is very satisfying, saving a significant amount of time

nodes.label: Professional reputation and accuracy
nodes.grounding_span: this can be quite embarrassing for any company to experience

nodes.label: Customer and staff well-being
nodes.grounding_span: they might feel more helpless and frustrated by the situation

nodes.label: Satisfaction with AI for time-saving tasks
nodes.grounding_span: Saving time generating templates for bulk email dissemination is very satisfying

nodes.label: Caution about AI errors without proofreading
nodes.grounding_span: there have been some instances of people failing to proof read and remove incorrect information

nodes.label: Skepticism about AI handling nuanced human judgment
nodes.grounding_span: I don't know how an AI system would deal with some of the challenges of complicated maintenance work

nodes.label: Openness to future AI adoption
nodes.grounding_span: I will likely try to use it in different types of tasks and observe whether this enhances the workflow

nodes.label: Pragmatic experimentation — tries AI in new tasks to observe outcomes
nodes.grounding_span: I will likely try to use it in different types of tasks and observe whether this enhances the workflow

nodes.label: Empathetic perspective-taking — considers emotional impact on others
nodes.grounding_span: if they had to receive this news through an LLM AI System without any recourse to escalate the issue further, they might feel more helpless and frustrated
